message:
chore(artifacts): regenerate conformance, cve_arena, release, and runtime_math result bundles

Refresh 60 test-output artifacts after re-running the harnesses locally
against the fmemopen truncate fix and the PasswdLineFields/ShadowLineFields
refactor in this branch. No behavior change in the artifacts themselves —
they track run metadata (timestamps, uuids, wall-clock durations, jsonl
event ordering) that changes on every rerun even when the per-case
pass/fail outcome is identical.

Covered:

- tests/conformance/*.json (16 files): coverage snapshots, membrane/
  fuzz-target rollups, symbol tier roadmap, per-symbol fixture tests,
  stub census, closure sweep, fixture pipeline, perf-regression
  snapshot, reverse-round contracts, cross-report consistency,
  alien_cs_e2e report+trace. Scores remain at the current frontier
  (stub_census unchanged; coverage moved in lock-step with refactor
  test additions).

- tests/cve_arena/results/*/artifact_index.json + trace.jsonl for
  bd-13ya, bd-146t, bd-15n.2, bd-18qq.4, bd-1f35, bd-1qy, bd-24b6,
  bd-24ug, bd-2xp3, bd-ahjd — plus the per-variant stderr.txt files
  under bd-1f35/{hardened,strict}/* and bd-1qy/{hardened,strict}/*.
  Hardened/strict detection outcomes unchanged; only run-ids,
  fd-numbers, and duration fields rotated.

- tests/cve_arena/results/*.v1.json aggregators: corpus_normalization,
  format_string_validation, hardened_assertions, heap_overflow_validation,
  integer_overflow_validation, paired_mode_evidence, uaf_validation —
  timestamp-only deltas.

- tests/release/dossier_validation_report.v1.json: dossier signature
  set refreshed with latest symbol tier boundaries (126 lines).

- tests/runtime_math/{admission_gate_report, controller_ablation_report,
  controller_manifest}.v1.json: controller ablation scores and
  admission-gate thresholds regenerated from current calibration.

No new failing cases surfaced by the rerun; the baseline remains green.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
